summary: Wastewater process optimization that also delivers measured carbon removal.
editor_note: This is climate tech with an operator's wedge: make sewage plants cheaper before selling carbon removal. CREW uses calcium carbonate dosing, closed-system measurement, and projects at nearly 10 facilities; one utility may defer a $350M upgrade. Unlike credits-first carbon removal, the buyer also gets better pH, settleability, and chemical spend. That dual value is why it feels less fragile than most climate markets.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes CREW Carbon: Wastewater process optimization that also delivers measured carbon removal.
CREW uses calcium carbonate dosing, closed-system measurement, and projects at nearly 10 facilities; one utility may defer a $350M upgrade.

market_context.primary_user: Climate, infrastructure, or operations teams evaluating measurable sustainability workflows.
market_context.why_now: Recent source-backed funding and public product evidence make water tech, carbon removal, wastewater worth tracking.

risks.claim: Continued tracking should verify whether the public product evidence turns into durable customer adoption beyond the currently visible surface.
risks.basis: VentureDex editorial assessment based on official product evidence and funding-source review.
